answerToWhatGame: 1601570

concludingNotes: With these settings, Steam Deck OLED works for about 2 hours. The framerate can drop to 28 fps when there are a lot of particles on the screen. The rest of the time, the game runs at a comfortable 30-40 fps, and in some rooms inside the base, it even reaches 60 fps.
Enjoy the game ;)
